The '''''Kuratcha''''' was the [[Flagship/Legends|mothership]] of the [[Hiromi Empire]].

==History==
It was involved in the attempt to incite war among the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] members, the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] and the [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Lahsbee]], and took part in the [[Battle of Zeltros]] during [[Operation: Glorious Destiny]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

Its crew included [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hookyr]], [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Hirog]], [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Phoebe]], and Chief Navigator [[Tahkay]]. After the Battle of Zeltros, Hirog requested a transfer back to the [[Hiromi]] homeworld for the ''Kuratcha'' and its entire crew.
